'''dhodhathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quackless|quackless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-dh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quackless|quackless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhodhathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodhathithi|dhodhathithi]] || [[word:dhodhathiji|dhodhathiji]] || [[word:dhodhathishi|dhodhathishi]] || [[word:dhodhathiki|dhodhathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodhathuthuthu|dhodhathuthuthu]] || [[word:dhodhathujuju|dhodhathujuju]] || [[word:dhodhathushushu|dhodhathushushu]] || [[word:dhodhathukuku|dhodhathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodhathuthu|dhodhathuthu]] || [[word:dhodhathuju|dhodhathuju]] || [[word:dhodhathushu|dhodhathushu]] || [[word:dhodhathuku|dhodhathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodhathufthuf|dhodhathufthuf]] || [[word:dhodhathufjuf|dhodhathufjuf]] || [[word:dhodhathufshuf|dhodhathufshuf]] || [[word:dhodhathufkuf|dhodhathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodhathethe|dhodhathethe]] || [[word:dhodhatheje|dhodhatheje]] || [[word:dhodhatheshe|dhodhatheshe]] || [[word:dhodhatheke|dhodhatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodhathothotho|dhodhathothotho]] || [[word:dhodhathojojo|dhodhathojojo]] || [[word:dhodhathoshosho|dhodhathoshosho]] || [[word:dhodhathokoko|dhodhathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodhathotho|dhodhathotho]] || [[word:dhodhathojo|dhodhathojo]] || [[word:dhodhathosho|dhodhathosho]] || [[word:dhodhathoko|dhodhathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodhathofthof|dhodhathofthof]] || [[word:dhodhathofjof|dhodhathofjof]] || [[word:dhodhathofshof|dhodhathofshof]] || [[word:dhodhathofkof|dhodhathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodhathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŠthĂŠ|dhodhathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŠjĂŠ|dhodhathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŠshĂŠ|dhodhathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodhathĂŠkĂŠ|dhodhathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodhathathatha|dhodhathathatha]] || [[word:dhodhathajaja|dhodhathajaja]] || [[word:dhodhathashasha|dhodhathashasha]] || [[word:dhodhathakaka|dhodhathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodhathatha|dhodhathatha]] || [[word:dhodhathaja|dhodhathaja]] || [[word:dhodhathasha|dhodhathasha]] || [[word:dhodhathaka|dhodhathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodhathafthaf|dhodhathafthaf]] || [[word:dhodhathafjaf|dhodhathafjaf]] || [[word:dhodhathafshaf|dhodhathafshaf]] || [[word:dhodhathafkaf|dhodhathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhodhathasha|dhodhathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodhathshĂ«sha|dhodhathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodhathrosha|dhodhathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodhathmusha|dhodhathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodhathyasha|dhodhathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodhathnkshĂ«sha|godhodhathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodhathnkrosha|godhodhathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodhathnkmusha|godhodhathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodhathnkyasha|godhodhathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhodhadhathasha|dhodhadhathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodhadhathshĂ«sha|dhodhadhathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodhadhathrosha|dhodhadhathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodhadhathmusha|dhodhadhathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodhadhathyasha|dhodhadhathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodhadhathnkshĂ«sha|godhodhadhathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodhadhathnkrosha|godhodhadhathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodhadhathnkmusha|godhodhadhathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodhadhathnkyasha|godhodhadhathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhedhĂŠthasha|dhedhĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhedhĂŠthshĂ«sha|dhedhĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhedhĂŠthrosha|dhedhĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhedhĂŠthmusha|dhedhĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhedhĂŠthyasha|dhedhĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhedhĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|godhedhĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhedhĂŠthnkrosha|godhedhĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhedhĂŠthnkmusha|godhedhĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhedhĂŠthnkyasha|godhedhĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhodhfathasha|dhodhfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodhfathshĂ«sha|dhodhfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodhfathrosha|dhodhfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodhfathmusha|dhodhfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodhfathyasha|dhodhfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodhfathnkshĂ«sha|godhodhfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodhfathnkrosha|godhodhfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodhfathnkmusha|godhodhfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodhfathnkyasha|godhodhfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
